name: cache layer: --cache-max-bytes prunes oldest entries to stay under limit
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/run-detector.sh" --rule no-eval --in "$PWD/big.js" --cache --cache-location "$PWD/.cache" --cache-max-bytes 1024 --cache-stats 2>out.json && grep -E '"pruned":[1-9]' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup: mkdir -p src && for i in $(seq 1 100); do echo "const x${i}='aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa';" >> big.js; done
